package.name: robot_bringup
package.description: Top-level "start all" meta-bringup for this workspace. Ships one launch file per robot (duco_bringup.launch.py, ur15_bringup.launch.py) that brings up the COMPLETE hand-guidance / Cartesian-compliance stack with a single command: robot ros2_control bringup, F/T sensing + gravity compensation, the cartesian_control_manager orchestrator, and the optional web dashboards. Each launch pins ROBOT_CONFIG_PATH to its robot's config so the robot-agnostic toolkit packages load the right settings.
